([Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Лидия Малахова; born (1991-07-13)13 July 1991) is a Russian female [track cyclist](/wiki/Track_cycling "Track cycling"). She competed in the team pursuit event at the [2014 UCI Track Cycling World Championships](/wiki/2014_UCI_Track_Cycling_World_Championships "2014 UCI Track Cycling World Championships").[[1]](#cite_note-1)
["2014 Track Cycling World Championships: Entries list"](http://www.tissottiming.com/File/Download?id=00030B0001FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF02). tissottiming.com. Retrieved 1 February 2016.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Russian track cyclist

Lidia Malakhova

| Personal information | |
| --- | --- |
| Born | (1991-07-13) 13 July 1991 (age 34) |
| Team information | |
| Discipline | [Track cycling](/wiki/Track_cycling "Track cycling") |
| Role | Rider |
| Rider type | team pursuit |

**Lidia Malakhova** ([Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Лидия Малахова; born (1991-07-13)13 July 1991) is a Russian female [track cyclist](/wiki/Track_cycling "Track cycling"). She competed in the team pursuit event at the [2014 UCI Track Cycling World Championships](/wiki/2014_UCI_Track_Cycling_World_Championships "2014 UCI Track Cycling World Championships").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Career results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lidia_Malakhova&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career results")]

2011
:   3rd Team Pursuit, UEC European U23 Track Championships (with [Elena Lichmanova](/w/index.php?title=Elena_Lichmanova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Elena Lichmanova (page does not exist)") and [Alexandra Goncharova](/wiki/Aleksandra_Goncharova_(cyclist) "Aleksandra Goncharova (cyclist)"))

2012
:   1st Team Pursuit, UEC European U23 Track Championships (with [Elena Lichmanova](/w/index.php?title=Elena_Lichmanova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Elena Lichmanova (page does not exist)") and [Galina Streltsova](/w/index.php?title=Galina_Streltsova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Galina Streltsova (page does not exist)"))

2014
:   2nd Points Race, Memorial of Alexander Lesnikov

2015
:   3rd Omnium, Memorial of Alexander Lesnikov

2016
:   Memorial of Alexander Lesnikov
:   1st Points Race

    :   2nd Scratch Race
